message:
fix(security): add domain separators to SHA-256 hashes in eviction saga, idempotency store, and proof-carrying decoder

Continuation of the hash collision hardening campaign — adds `|` byte
separators between concatenated fields in SHA-256 computations to prevent
distinct inputs from producing identical hash digests:

- connector/eviction_saga: EvictionSaga::content_hash() — separators
  between saga_id, artifact_id, current_phase, and transitions count

- remote/idempotency_store: IdempotencyDedupeStore::content_hash() —
  separators between schema version, entry keys, payload hashes, status
  strings, and outcome result hashes within the deduplication store digest

- repair/proof_carrying_decode: separators in proof hash computation
  in both ProofCarryingDecoder::decode() and ProofVerificationApi::verify()
  — ensures fragment hash lists, algorithm IDs, and output hashes are
  unambiguously delimited, preventing collisions when fragment boundaries
  shift (e.g., fragments ["ab","cd"] vs ["a","bcd"])

Also includes Cargo.lock update from concurrent dependency changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

-version = "0.2.5"
+version = "0.2.6"

  "franken-evidence",
  "franken-kernel",
@@ -362,15 +362,15 @@ dependencies = [

  "serde",
